message:
feat(cli): unified --format/--json output flags for contacts, deploy, and share commands

Add CliOutputFormat::resolve(format, json) pattern to contacts (request,
respond, set-policy), deploy (validate, verify-url, verify-live), and
share wizard commands. Each command now accepts --format table|json|toon
alongside the existing --json shorthand, with emit_output() dispatching
between structured JSON and human-readable table rendering.

Contacts commands: request/respond/set-policy now emit structured output
through the unified pipeline, replacing raw serde_json::to_string_pretty
calls with output::emit_output() and adding human-readable kv pairs for
the table path.

Deploy commands: validate, verify-url, and verify-live share the same
CliOutputFormat resolution, replacing ad-hoc if/else JSON branching.

Share wizard: routes resolved format into WizardOptions::json_output.

Also fixes clippy lints in mcp-agent-mail-tools/src/llm.rs:
- Use std::string::ToString::to_string instead of |s| s.to_string()
  closures for iter().map() chains.
- Exhaustive match patterns in TopMention assertions (Name/Count)
  replacing wildcard catch-all arms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
